title: ursinia pedunculosa
intro: Ursinia pedunculosa is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is commonly known as the Bush Daisy. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Ursinia pedunculosa include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Ursinia pedunculosa can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
